name: polymath-connector-datadog
description: Datadog connector: MCP server for metrics/logs/dashboards + skills for monitor authoring and dashboard hygiene.

datadogApiKey.title: Datadog API key
datadogApiKey.description: API key from Organization Settings → API Keys.

datadogAppKey.title: Datadog Application key
datadogAppKey.description: App key from Personal Settings → Application Keys (different from API key; both needed).
